rules.title: shai-hulud-2 mass npm typosquat campaign
rules.summary: Mass typosquat campaign publishing ~800 malicious packages to npm. Packages contained install-time exfiltration of environment variables and credentials via postinstall scripts.

package_rules.notes: Full list of ~798 packages should be imported from Wiz CSV feed via the csv-import helper. This is a placeholder entry.

host_indicators.notes: Exfiltrated environment variable dump. Actual exfil was typically to a remote endpoint, but local artifacts may exist.

remediation.summary: Remove all matched packages immediately. Rotate all environment variables, API keys, and credentials that were present during npm install.
steps: Remove all matched packages from dependencies and lockfiles.
Rotate ALL environment variables and secrets that were present during npm install.
Audit CI/CD pipeline secrets — these are primary targets.
Check npm audit logs for install timestamps to determine exposure window.
Report to security team for further investigation.
